items.title: A Changing of the Guard: Powell Out, Hassett Favored
items.description: As Jerome Powell's tenure enters its final phase, markets are looking ahead to the next chapter of monetary policy leadership. Trump ally and "dove" Kevin Hassett is the overwhelming favorite to replace Powell.

items.title: CrowdStrike, Carvana, Home Depot, Lowe's: Top Analyst Calls
items.description: Yahoo Finance senior reporter Brooke DiPalma keeps track of several Wall Street analyst calls on top trending stocks, including calls around shares of CrowdStrike (CRWD), Carvana (CVNA), Home Depot (HD), and Lowe's (LOW). To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

items.title: Is Home Depot Facing a Structural Demand Reset After Soft Q3 Comps?
items.description: HD's Q3 miss and muted forecast hint at a deeper demand shift, as housing pressures and consumer caution weigh on big-ticket sales.

items.title: Stifel Maintains Hold on Home Depot, Lowers Price Target to $350
items.description: Stifel  analyst W. Andrew Carter   maintains Home Depot (NYSE:HD) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $370 to $350.

items.title: Bear of the Day: Home Depot (HD)
items.description: Earnings stumble as housing pressure and cautious shoppers slow growth.
